short_text: Bumrah to Mark Watt, Bowled!! Smashes the base of leg stump with this yorker. Watt was in a different postcode, jumping
full_text: Bumrah to Mark Watt, Bowled!! Smashes the base of leg stump with this yorker. Watt was in a different postcode, jumping across the stumps to scoop. But he's thoroughly beaten for pace. And that's all Scotland have to offer.

short_text: Bumrah to Wheal, 1 run, speared in full on middle, Wheal gets a thick inside edge onto pad looking to whip it away
full_text: Bumrah to Wheal, 1 run, speared in full on middle, Wheal gets a thick inside edge onto pad looking to whip it away

short_text: Bumrah to Wheal, no run, length ball in the channel, Wheal misses an attempted cut
full_text: Bumrah to Wheal, no run, length ball in the channel, Wheal misses an attempted cut

short_text: Bumrah to Mark Watt, 1 run, dipping full toss that almost deceives Watt. He manages to hold his shot though, dragging it
full_text: Bumrah to Mark Watt, 1 run, dipping full toss that almost deceives Watt. He manages to hold his shot though, dragging it to long-on

short_text: Shami to Wheal, no run, short and wide, seemed to be pace off, and Wheal almost drags it back on looking to cut. It goes
full_text: Shami to Wheal, no run, short and wide, seemed to be pace off, and Wheal almost drags it back on looking to cut. It goes past leg stump to short fine

short_text: Shami to Mark Watt, 1 run, low full toss outside off, driven to sweeper cover
full_text: Shami to Mark Watt, 1 run, low full toss outside off, driven to sweeper cover

short_text: Shami to Wheal, 1 run, keeps it full and straight, Wheal manages to knock it to mid-off
full_text: Shami to Wheal, 1 run, keeps it full and straight, Wheal manages to knock it to mid-off

short_text: Shami to Evans, Bowled!! Three wickets in three balls. Scotland nine down. Another blistering yorker from Shami, deflect
full_text: Shami to Evans, Bowled!! Three wickets in three balls. Scotland nine down. Another blistering yorker from Shami, deflects off the toe perhaps and pegs back the top of leg stump. Such a treat to watch Shami in such rhythm. Way too good for the lower order.

short_text: Shami to Safyaan Sharif, Safyaan Sharif Run Out!! Where's he going? His mind is probably on the LBW appeal and he comes
full_text: Shami to Safyaan Sharif, Safyaan Sharif Run Out!! Where's he going? His mind is probably on the LBW appeal and he comes charging down for a non-existent single. Kishan picks up the ball coming in from midwicket and has so much time that he doesn't need to throw. He runs up to the stumps to knock over the bails. It was a cracking yorker on leg stump, sneaking through to hit the back heel. Was going down, so the LBW wasn't on.

short_text: Shami to MacLeod, Bowled!! Full and straight at good pace, MacLeod plays across the line of it, misses, and it smashes i
full_text: Shami to MacLeod, Bowled!! Full and straight at good pace, MacLeod plays across the line of it, misses, and it smashes into the stumps. Second wicket for Shami as MacLeod's struggles come to an end.

short_text: Ashwin to MacLeod, 1 run, takes it on the full and sweeps to deep backward square
full_text: Ashwin to MacLeod, 1 run, takes it on the full and sweeps to deep backward square

short_text: Ashwin to Mark Watt, , ! Watt came down the track there and Ashwin responded cleverly by firing it wide outside off, tak
full_text: Ashwin to Mark Watt, , ! Watt came down the track there and Ashwin responded cleverly by firing it wide outside off, taking it out of his reach. But Pant couldn't gather it cleanly

short_text: Ashwin to Mark Watt, 2 runs, goes reverse and it balloons off a thick top-edge. For a moment Chakravarthy is interested
full_text: Ashwin to Mark Watt, 2 runs, goes reverse and it balloons off a thick top-edge. For a moment Chakravarthy is interested running back from short third, but it's over him. They get back for two

short_text: Ashwin to Mark Watt, no run, the conventional off-break. Ashwin slows it up nicely around off stump and Watt pushes to c
full_text: Ashwin to Mark Watt, no run, the conventional off-break. Ashwin slows it up nicely around off stump and Watt pushes to cover

short_text: Ashwin to MacLeod, 1 run, carrom ball on off with Ashwin jumping wide on the crease. MacLeod sweeps to deep backward squ
full_text: Ashwin to MacLeod, 1 run, carrom ball on off with Ashwin jumping wide on the crease. MacLeod sweeps to deep backward square

short_text: Ashwin to Mark Watt, 1 run, down the pitch again, drills it to long-off
full_text: Ashwin to Mark Watt, 1 run, down the pitch again, drills it to long-off

short_text: Ashwin to Mark Watt, , floated out wide as Watt advances down. He reaches out for a drive but can only get a thick outsi
full_text: Ashwin to Mark Watt, , floated out wide as Watt advances down. He reaches out for a drive but can only get a thick outside edge. There's no slip though and it runs away fine for four

short_text: Jadeja to Mark Watt, 1 run, steps out and drags this off a thick inside edge through square leg. Wasn't anywhere near th
full_text: Jadeja to Mark Watt, 1 run, steps out and drags this off a thick inside edge through square leg. Wasn't anywhere near the pitch

short_text: Jadeja to Mark Watt, no run, turns it to midwicket
full_text: Jadeja to Mark Watt, no run, turns it to midwicket

short_text: Jadeja to Mark Watt, , not the greatest effort from Shami at the boundary. Short outside off, Watt slaps it hard through
full_text: Jadeja to Mark Watt, , not the greatest effort from Shami at the boundary. Short outside off, Watt slaps it hard through point. Shami got there, but had trouble bending down for a one-handed pick-up. It sneaks through for four

short_text: Jadeja to Mark Watt, no run, steps out, isn't quite to the pitch but manages to drive to the right of Jadeja who makes a
full_text: Jadeja to Mark Watt, no run, steps out, isn't quite to the pitch but manages to drive to the right of Jadeja who makes a diving stop to cut off the single

short_text: Jadeja to Mark Watt, no run, defended back down the pitch
full_text: Jadeja to Mark Watt, no run, defended back down the pitch

short_text: Jadeja to MacLeod, 1 run, length ball outside off, driven through cover
full_text: Jadeja to MacLeod, 1 run, length ball outside off, driven through cover

short_text: Ashwin to Mark Watt, no run, length ball turning in on off from round the wicket, not sure if it was the carrom ball or
full_text: Ashwin to Mark Watt, no run, length ball turning in on off from round the wicket, not sure if it was the carrom ball or the back-spinner. Watt gets forward and defends

short_text: Ashwin to MacLeod, 1 run, pushed down to long-on as Ashwin fires in an under-cutter
full_text: Ashwin to MacLeod, 1 run, pushed down to long-on as Ashwin fires in an under-cutter

short_text: Ashwin to Chris Greaves, Caught by Hardik Pandya!! Sliced in the air after stepping out. It's an easy catch at long-off
full_text: Ashwin to Chris Greaves, Caught by Hardik Pandya!! Sliced in the air after stepping out. It's an easy catch at long-off for Hardik Pandya. Wasn't quite to the pitch of this carrom ball as Ashwin fired it in, but he tried going through with the shot. It doesn't work out very well as he skews it off the outside half.

short_text: Ashwin to Chris Greaves, , sprays this carrom ball down leg, probably expecting him to back away again. Greaves doesn't
full_text: Ashwin to Chris Greaves, , sprays this carrom ball down leg, probably expecting him to back away again. Greaves doesn't move though

short_text: Ashwin to Chris Greaves, no run, flat on middle, another carrom ball on back of a length, Greaves backs away to slap it
full_text: Ashwin to Chris Greaves, no run, flat on middle, another carrom ball on back of a length, Greaves backs away to slap it through extra cover but chops it down the pitch off a thick bottom-edge

short_text: Ashwin to Chris Greaves, no run, Pant says it's high. Kohli takes his time, and then goes for a review. A carrom ball on
full_text: Ashwin to Chris Greaves, no run, Pant says it's high. Kohli takes his time, and then goes for a review. A carrom ball on middle, straightens nicely and hits Greaves on the body as he misses the reverse-sweep. Height the only issue. And Pant's right,

short_text: Ashwin to MacLeod, 1 run, carrom ball outside off, back of a length, MacLeod punches it through point
full_text: Ashwin to MacLeod, 1 run, carrom ball outside off, back of a length, MacLeod punches it through point

short_text: Bumrah to Chris Greaves, no run, goes for the yorker again, Greaves digs it out to mid-off. Top over that from Bumrah
full_text: Bumrah to Chris Greaves, no run, goes for the yorker again, Greaves digs it out to mid-off. Top over that from Bumrah

short_text: Bumrah to Chris Greaves, no run, and there's the surprise short delivery when the batter is expecting a yorker, Greaves
full_text: Bumrah to Chris Greaves, no run, and there's the surprise short delivery when the batter is expecting a yorker, Greaves manages to get inside line and miss

short_text: Bumrah to Chris Greaves, no run, Bumrah is trying his luck with slower yorker and full yorkers to hit the stumps, but he
full_text: Bumrah to Chris Greaves, no run, Bumrah is trying his luck with slower yorker and full yorkers to hit the stumps, but he's not getting it. Greaves manages to toe-end to the bowler

short_text: Bumrah to MacLeod, 1 run, oh almost dangerously late-cuts very late. Almost missed that and lost the poles. Guided to th
full_text: Bumrah to MacLeod, 1 run, oh almost dangerously late-cuts very late. Almost missed that and lost the poles. Guided to third man eventually

short_text: Bumrah to MacLeod, no run, now goes for the full pace off stump yorker, MacLeod just manages to dig it out
full_text: Bumrah to MacLeod, no run, now goes for the full pace off stump yorker, MacLeod just manages to dig it out

short_text: Bumrah to MacLeod, no run, oh brilliant slower delivery outside off stump, MacLeod into the shot early. Very lucky that
full_text: Bumrah to MacLeod, no run, oh brilliant slower delivery outside off stump, MacLeod into the shot early. Very lucky that this wasn't on the off stump

short_text: Jadeja to MacLeod, 1 run, flat and honing in on the stumps, punched off the back foot to cover
full_text: Jadeja to MacLeod, 1 run, flat and honing in on the stumps, punched off the back foot to cover

short_text: Jadeja to MacLeod, no run, covers the sticks and defends
full_text: Jadeja to MacLeod, no run, covers the sticks and defends

short_text: Jadeja to MacLeod, no run, shortish and outside off stump, MacLeod chops the cut shot towards point
full_text: Jadeja to MacLeod, no run, shortish and outside off stump, MacLeod chops the cut shot towards point

short_text: Jadeja to Chris Greaves, 1 run, moves across and clips this full delivery to the right of short mid-wicket
full_text: Jadeja to Chris Greaves, 1 run, moves across and clips this full delivery to the right of short mid-wicket

short_text: Jadeja to Leask, Lbw!! Jadeja gets his third. Scotland lose another set batter. Slider on the stumps, wasn't really full
full_text: Jadeja to Leask, Lbw!! Jadeja gets his third. Scotland lose another set batter. Slider on the stumps, wasn't really full to be sweeping, the ball went over the bat and hit him on the thigh. Impact plumb in front of middle stump and Erasmus was absolutely convinced. So much so that Leask and MacLeod were not even pondering the review. Ball-tracker says smashing leg stump.

short_text: Jadeja to MacLeod, 1 run, short and spinning away on the leg stump, MacLeod punches it to long-on
full_text: Jadeja to MacLeod, 1 run, short and spinning away on the leg stump, MacLeod punches it to long-on

short_text: Shami to MacLeod, 1 run, full toss, MacLeod taps it to long-on
full_text: Shami to MacLeod, 1 run, full toss, MacLeod taps it to long-on

short_text: Shami to MacLeod, no run, appeal for LBW, but ump not keen. Shami bowled a really full delivery, the ball was just sneak
full_text: Shami to MacLeod, no run, appeal for LBW, but ump not keen. Shami bowled a really full delivery, the ball was just sneaking down leg stump

short_text: Shami to Leask, 1 run, knocked around to square leg
full_text: Shami to Leask, 1 run, knocked around to square leg

short_text: Shami to Leask, , overpitched and smashed. Kohli had mid-off in and he was wide too. Leask stays leg-side and gives it a
full_text: Shami to Leask, , overpitched and smashed. Kohli had mid-off in and he was wide too. Leask stays leg-side and gives it a proper whack, hit all along the ground

short_text: Shami to Leask, , short delivery, top edge and it flies all the way. Leask has been getting some fighting runs in this c
full_text: Shami to Leask, , short delivery, top edge and it flies all the way. Leask has been getting some fighting runs in this comp. Gets six vital runs here. Bumper from Shami rushes the batter, Leask plays the pull and it clears fine leg

short_text: Shami to MacLeod, 1 run, fullish and on the stumps, MacLeod knocks it around to mid-wicket
full_text: Shami to MacLeod, 1 run, fullish and on the stumps, MacLeod knocks it around to mid-wicket

short_text: Chakaravarthy to MacLeod, 1 run, oh a high fulll toss, just under the waist, the ball slips out of his hands. MacLeod cu
full_text: Chakaravarthy to MacLeod, 1 run, oh a high fulll toss, just under the waist, the ball slips out of his hands. MacLeod cuts it to deep backward point

short_text: Chakaravarthy to MacLeod, no run, very full delivery, rushed defence from MacLeod. Didn't have the time to fully get bac
full_text: Chakaravarthy to MacLeod, no run, very full delivery, rushed defence from MacLeod. Didn't have the time to fully get back

short_text: Chakaravarthy to Leask, 1 run, tapped away to cover-point
full_text: Chakaravarthy to Leask, 1 run, tapped away to cover-point

short_text: Chakaravarthy to Leask, , first boundary for Scotland after ball 3.6. Brings the sweep out and plays it along the ground
full_text: Chakaravarthy to Leask, , first boundary for Scotland after ball 3.6. Brings the sweep out and plays it along the ground, splits fine leg and deep mid-wicket to perfection

short_text: Chakaravarthy to Leask, 2 runs, oh close to chopping on. The drifted back in, Leask looks to cut but it wasn't short, ge
full_text: Chakaravarthy to Leask, 2 runs, oh close to chopping on. The drifted back in, Leask looks to cut but it wasn't short, gets away with it as the ball rolls to fine lev

short_text: Chakaravarthy to Leask, no run, very full and spinning back in, Leask inside edges the drive to leg
full_text: Chakaravarthy to Leask, no run, very full and spinning back in, Leask inside edges the drive to leg

short_text: Jadeja to Leask, 1 run, on the leg stump, Leask goes and knocks it to mid-wicket
full_text: Jadeja to Leask, 1 run, on the leg stump, Leask goes and knocks it to mid-wicket

short_text: Jadeja to MacLeod, 1 run, top edge sweep shot but lands safely at mid-wicket. In fact looked like it went off the toe en
full_text: Jadeja to MacLeod, 1 run, top edge sweep shot but lands safely at mid-wicket. In fact looked like it went off the toe end of the bat

short_text: Jadeja to MacLeod, no run, Jadeja targets the pads with a 97kph dart, MacLeod keeps the bat in front and defends well
full_text: Jadeja to MacLeod, no run, Jadeja targets the pads with a 97kph dart, MacLeod keeps the bat in front and defends well

short_text: Jadeja to Leask, 1 run, oh wanted to drive to long-off, gets it to long-on instead
full_text: Jadeja to Leask, 1 run, oh wanted to drive to long-off, gets it to long-on instead

full_text: Jadeja to MacLeod, 1 run, plays the reverse sweep, but man at short third man dives and stops

full_text: Jadeja to MacLeod, no run, flighted delivery on the leg stump, MacLeod defends

short_text: Ashwin to Leask, no run, now beats the outside edge with the carrom ball. Fullish and spinning away, Leask wants the for
full_text: Ashwin to Leask, no run, now beats the outside edge with the carrom ball. Fullish and spinning away, Leask wants the forward defence, misses

short_text: Ashwin to MacLeod, 1 run, oh the drifter almost troubling MacLeod, hangs back and leaves the bat out in hope looking to
full_text: Ashwin to MacLeod, 1 run, oh the drifter almost troubling MacLeod, hangs back and leaves the bat out in hope looking to defend because he didn't know what that ball was going to do, the ball takes the outside edge and rolls towards point

short_text: Ashwin to MacLeod, no run, goes back and defends nicely with the full face of the bat
full_text: Ashwin to MacLeod, no run, goes back and defends nicely with the full face of the bat

full_text: Ashwin to Leask, 1 run, full and outside off stump, Leask drives square of the wicket on the off-side

short_text: Ashwin to MacLeod, 1 run, sweeps this along the ground to deep backward square leg
full_text: Ashwin to MacLeod, 1 run, sweeps this along the ground to deep backward square leg

short_text: Ashwin to MacLeod, no run, covers the line and defends
full_text: Ashwin to MacLeod, no run, covers the line and defends

short_text: Jadeja to Matthew Cross, Lbw!! It's a 99kph dart from Jadeja with the intention of beating the batter for pace and he's
full_text: Jadeja to Matthew Cross, Lbw!! It's a 99kph dart from Jadeja with the intention of beating the batter for pace and he's done that perfectly. Cross was late on the back foot looking to play on-side, impact on the back leg in line with middle and leg. A very confident raise of the finger from ump Tucker. Scotland discussed and reluctantly reviewed, only to lose one. India on top.

short_text: Jadeja to MacLeod, 1 run, gets down on his knees and paddles it to fine leg
full_text: Jadeja to MacLeod, 1 run, gets down on his knees and paddles it to fine leg

short_text: Jadeja to MacLeod, no run, and he darts the next one at 96kph, blocked off the back foot
full_text: Jadeja to MacLeod, no run, and he darts the next one at 96kph, blocked off the back foot

short_text: Jadeja to Berrington, Bowled!! Ravi Jadeja. He looks so good when he beats a forward defence of a right-hander and hits
full_text: Jadeja to Berrington, Bowled!! Ravi Jadeja. He looks so good when he beats a forward defence of a right-hander and hits the top of the stumps. He does that so well in Tests, India would wish he does that often with the white ball too. Perfect length this time. Not very full, but full enough to draw the batter, hint of turn from that angle from round the wicket, past the outside edge and the sticks are ignited.

short_text: Jadeja to Matthew Cross, 1 run, shortish delivery on the leg stump, Cross sweeps it through backward square leg
full_text: Jadeja to Matthew Cross, 1 run, shortish delivery on the leg stump, Cross sweeps it through backward square leg

short_text: Jadeja to Matthew Cross, no run, flatter delivery on the stumps, Cross goes back and leading-edges the flick towards the
full_text: Jadeja to Matthew Cross, no run, flatter delivery on the stumps, Cross goes back and leading-edges the flick towards the bowler

short_text: Shami to Berrington, no run, follows it up with a brilliant yorker. Oh it onto the stumps and Berrington wasn't aware. H
full_text: Shami to Berrington, no run, follows it up with a brilliant yorker. Oh it onto the stumps and Berrington wasn't aware. He somehome manages toe-end this, very lucky to survive. Shami begins with a

short_text: Shami to Berrington, no run, now the surprise short delivery. Berrington looks to fend but he turned his head away in fe
full_text: Shami to Berrington, no run, now the surprise short delivery. Berrington looks to fend but he turned his head away in fear. The ball thuds the left glove and hits the shoulder

short_text: Shami to Berrington, no run, half shout for LBW as Berrington misses the defence and gets hit on the pad, but it was sli
full_text: Shami to Berrington, no run, half shout for LBW as Berrington misses the defence and gets hit on the pad, but it was slipping down

short_text: Shami to Berrington, no run, short of length delivery on the stumps, Berrington hops and defends
full_text: Shami to Berrington, no run, short of length delivery on the stumps, Berrington hops and defends

short_text: Shami to Munsey, Caught by Hardik Pandya!! Slower ball inviting the big hit and he's hit it straight to mid-on. Very goo
full_text: Shami to Munsey, Caught by Hardik Pandya!! Slower ball inviting the big hit and he's hit it straight to mid-on. Very good from Shami. Made Munsey think ah I can get a boundary and made him fall in the trap. Munsey took his front leg out and got into position for a mighty hit towards long-on, but he didn't get the elevation. Hardik takes a good low grab. Simple for this level. Scotland lose their set batter.

short_text: Shami to Munsey, no run, Shami starts aiming at the blockhole too. Munsey digs it out to mid-off
full_text: Shami to Munsey, no run, Shami starts aiming at the blockhole too. Munsey digs it out to mid-off

short_text: Chakaravarthy to Matthew Cross, no run, spinning back in, Cross just manages to get the bat down in time
full_text: Chakaravarthy to Matthew Cross, no run, spinning back in, Cross just manages to get the bat down in time

short_text: Chakaravarthy to Munsey, 1 run, driven firmly to mid-off, but KL cuts it off in the circle by quickly coming across
full_text: Chakaravarthy to Munsey, 1 run, driven firmly to mid-off, but KL cuts it off in the circle by quickly coming across

short_text: Chakaravarthy to Munsey, no run, tries the reverse sweep again but gets hit on the pad
full_text: Chakaravarthy to Munsey, no run, tries the reverse sweep again but gets hit on the pad

short_text: Chakaravarthy to Munsey, no run, really full delivery, squeezed out towards mid-off. Oh that ball randomly spun away fro
full_text: Chakaravarthy to Munsey, no run, really full delivery, squeezed out towards mid-off. Oh that ball randomly spun away from KL and almost escaped him. KL did well to react and stop

short_text: Chakaravarthy to Matthew Cross, 1 run, overpitched delivery but Varun Chakaravarthy has protection at long-on, driven fo
full_text: Chakaravarthy to Matthew Cross, 1 run, overpitched delivery but Varun Chakaravarthy has protection at long-on, driven for one run

short_text: Chakaravarthy to Matthew Cross, no run, drifting back in, Cross blocks it towards mid-off
full_text: Chakaravarthy to Matthew Cross, no run, drifting back in, Cross blocks it towards mid-off

short_text: Ashwin to Munsey, , it's the reverse sweep again, but this time it's gone off a top edge. They all count. Flies over sho
full_text: Ashwin to Munsey, , it's the reverse sweep again, but this time it's gone off a top edge. They all count. Flies over short third man to make it a hat-trick of fours. Ashwin won the first half of that over, but Munsey bossing the second half

short_text: Ashwin to Munsey, , but Munsey plays the reverse sweep and gets four. He's making a brilliant statement here. You may ha
full_text: Ashwin to Munsey, , but Munsey plays the reverse sweep and gets four. He's making a brilliant statement here. You may have been brilliant to stop, but I still back myself and I wil play it. Gets this between backward point and short third man. KL with a gesture that probably reads "Make him drive."

short_text: Ashwin to Munsey, , this a good hit. Backed away and gave himself room. Ashwin this time bowled the slingly flat ball, M
full_text: Ashwin to Munsey, , this a good hit. Backed away and gave himself room. Ashwin this time bowled the slingly flat ball, Munsey did well to time that wide of mid-off

short_text: Ashwin to Munsey, no run, oh he was lining for a sweep and then realised it wasn't short. nice bowling from Ash, tucked
full_text: Ashwin to Munsey, no run, oh he was lining for a sweep and then realised it wasn't short. nice bowling from Ash, tucked this to square leg

short_text: Ashwin to Munsey, no run, Munsey backs away, Ashwin sees and says, okay I will follow you. Munsey slogs, drags it to the
full_text: Ashwin to Munsey, no run, Munsey backs away, Ashwin sees and says, okay I will follow you. Munsey slogs, drags it to the left of mid-wicket, who dives and stops the run. Two dots

short_text: Ashwin to Munsey, no run, roundarmish flatter delivery to start with, Munsey defends
full_text: Ashwin to Munsey, no run, roundarmish flatter delivery to start with, Munsey defends

short_text: Bumrah to Matthew Cross, no run, blocks the slower delivery and it's a wicket-maiden
full_text: Bumrah to Matthew Cross, no run, blocks the slower delivery and it's a wicket-maiden

short_text: Bumrah to Matthew Cross, no run, in the airrrrr . Brilliant attempt from him. Brilliant ball from Bumrah. Off-cutter, Cr
full_text: Bumrah to Matthew Cross, no run, in the airrrrr . Brilliant attempt from him. Brilliant ball from Bumrah. Off-cutter, Cross didn't have a clue, played the defence early with hard hands, it flew off the outer half of the bat. India had a cover-point, but he was on the edge of the circle, was dying on him and SKY put in a valiant full length dive forward

short_text: Bumrah to Matthew Cross, no run, lovely full delivery on the stumps, Cross keeps it out
full_text: Bumrah to Matthew Cross, no run, lovely full delivery on the stumps, Cross keeps it out

short_text: Bumrah to Coetzer, Bowled!! Timbaah! Set him up with some really full bowling. Coetzer was hanging deep in the crease to
full_text: Bumrah to Coetzer, Bowled!! Timbaah! Set him up with some really full bowling. Coetzer was hanging deep in the crease to counter that, looks to drive through the off-side but doesn't read the slower ball. Plays early and drags this back onto the off stump. Early wicket India wanted and it's come from their spearhead.

short_text: Bumrah to Coetzer, no run, in the airrr, doesn't carry to mid-on. Slower delivery into the pitch, Coetzer early into the
full_text: Bumrah to Coetzer, no run, in the airrr, doesn't carry to mid-on. Slower delivery into the pitch, Coetzer early into the defence, checks the shot, escapes

short_text: Bumrah to Coetzer, no run, Bumrah is searching for those toes. Coetzer stays low and defends with the full face of the b
full_text: Bumrah to Coetzer, no run, Bumrah is searching for those toes. Coetzer stays low and defends with the full face of the bat

short_text: Chakaravarthy to Munsey, no run, tries the reverse sweep again but misses this time
full_text: Chakaravarthy to Munsey, no run, tries the reverse sweep again but misses this time

short_text: Chakaravarthy to Munsey, , oh the reverse sweep. Munsey being bold and wanting to make a statement in his 50th T20I. Cha
full_text: Chakaravarthy to Munsey, , oh the reverse sweep. Munsey being bold and wanting to make a statement in his 50th T20I. Chakaravarthy bowls full, Munsey gets it fine of short third man and gets himself and the team into double digits

short_text: Chakaravarthy to Munsey, no run, flighted delivery on the stumps, Munsey defends
full_text: Chakaravarthy to Munsey, no run, flighted delivery on the stumps, Munsey defends

short_text: Chakaravarthy to Coetzer, 1 run, on the stumps, Coetzer flicks it to mid-wicket
full_text: Chakaravarthy to Coetzer, 1 run, on the stumps, Coetzer flicks it to mid-wicket

short_text: Chakaravarthy to Coetzer, no run, "Oyeee, he, he, he," is the chirp from Pant as Chakaravarthy gets this to drift back i
full_text: Chakaravarthy to Coetzer, no run, "Oyeee, he, he, he," is the chirp from Pant as Chakaravarthy gets this to drift back into the right-hander in line off stump, Coetzer manages to show the full face of the bat and play to the off-side

short_text: Chakaravarthy to Coetzer, no run, flatter and on the leg stump, Coetzer defends
full_text: Chakaravarthy to Coetzer, no run, flatter and on the leg stump, Coetzer defends

short_text: Bumrah to Munsey, , oh what a whip of those wrists! Bumrah was looking to bowl full and in the blockhole, so Munsey went
full_text: Bumrah to Munsey, , oh what a whip of those wrists! Bumrah was looking to bowl full and in the blockhole, so Munsey went deep in the crease and this one didn't swing, Munsey brought the bat down and used his wrists to whip it handsomely over deep square leg. Brilliant finish to the over for Scotland

short_text: Bumrah to Munsey, no run, short of length delivery outside off stump, Munsey punches it towards mid-off
full_text: Bumrah to Munsey, no run, short of length delivery outside off stump, Munsey punches it towards mid-off

short_text: Bumrah to Coetzer, leg byes, 1 run, oh inswinging low full toss to Coetzer this time, again hit low on the pad and missi
full_text: Bumrah to Coetzer, leg byes, 1 run, oh inswinging low full toss to Coetzer this time, again hit low on the pad and missing leg

short_text: Bumrah to Munsey, 1 run, bowls a yorker length delivery just outside off stump, Munsey squeezes it out to third man
full_text: Bumrah to Munsey, 1 run, bowls a yorker length delivery just outside off stump, Munsey squeezes it out to third man

short_text: Bumrah to Munsey, no run, now gets this full inswinger just outside off stump, Munsey stays leg-side and mistimes the dr
full_text: Bumrah to Munsey, no run, now gets this full inswinger just outside off stump, Munsey stays leg-side and mistimes the drive to mid-off

short_text: Bumrah to Munsey, no run, smashes the pad with some inswing but it's going down leg. Munsey beaten on the flick shot. Bu
full_text: Bumrah to Munsey, no run, smashes the pad with some inswing but it's going down leg. Munsey beaten on the flick shot. Bumrah bowling full and getting some swing

short_text: Chris Greaves to Suryakumar Yadav, , Yadav finishes things in style, too full and he is a destroyer of spin bowling anyw
full_text: Chris Greaves to Suryakumar Yadav, , Yadav finishes things in style, too full and he is a destroyer of spin bowling anyway, didn't need a second invitation. Went straight with the loft and cleared the ropes with ease

full_text: Chris Greaves to Suryakumar Yadav, no run, flatter and outside off, extra bounce, SKY fails to connect the cut

full_text: Chris Greaves to Kohli, 1 run, fastish leg-break on leg stump, Kohli mistimes the pull behind square leg

short_text: Mark Watt to Rahul, Caught by MacLeod!! Wants to end it in style but can't! Probably a lot slower than Watt's usual pace
full_text: Mark Watt to Rahul, Caught by MacLeod!! Wants to end it in style but can't! Probably a lot slower than Watt's usual pace, Rahul is a fraction early into the loft and gets more height than distance on this one. Mid-on trekked back and got under the skier rather easily. What a knock this was from Rahul though! When carnage met artistry!

short_text: Mark Watt to Kohli, 1 run, quicker one on leg stump, nudged past mid-wicket
full_text: Mark Watt to Kohli, 1 run, quicker one on leg stump, nudged past mid-wicket

full_text: Mark Watt to Rahul, 1 run, flatter and fuller, jammed out to mid-on.

short_text: Mark Watt to Rahul, , Premeditated from Rahul, gets across and sweeps it clean. Fine leg is up, not that it would have m
full_text: Mark Watt to Rahul, , Premeditated from Rahul, gets across and sweeps it clean. Fine leg is up, not that it would have mattered. Went deep into the stands

short_text: Mark Watt to Rahul, no run, flatter and fuller, dug out to mid-off
full_text: Mark Watt to Rahul, no run, flatter and fuller, dug out to mid-off

short_text: Mark Watt to Rahul, , can't nail the yorker, low full toss and Rahul blasts it past mid-off who barely had any time to r
full_text: Mark Watt to Rahul, , can't nail the yorker, low full toss and Rahul blasts it past mid-off who barely had any time to react. Rocketed to the fence

short_text: Wheal to Rohit, Lbw!! , good pace and nothing much Rohit could do about this one. To be fair, it would take out any batt
full_text: Wheal to Rohit, Lbw!! , good pace and nothing much Rohit could do about this one. To be fair, it would take out any batter in the world. He was pinned on the crease, didn't probably expect Wheal to nail it in the blockhole but the pacer did just that. Rohit can't get his bat down in time and gets struck on the boot. The LBW appeal and the ump's finger going up was almost parallel, which tells you how plumb it was. Rohit has done his bit anyway. India all set to go past Afghanistan in net run rate.

short_text: Wheal to Rohit, , shortish on off, too short though and Rohit loves it there. Stands tall and straight-pulls it clean ov
full_text: Wheal to Rohit, , shortish on off, too short though and Rohit loves it there. Stands tall and straight-pulls it clean over mid-on. One bounce and to the fence

short_text: Wheal to Rahul, 1 run, fuller and straighter, wristed away to deep mid-wicket
full_text: Wheal to Rahul, 1 run, fuller and straighter, wristed away to deep mid-wicket

short_text: Wheal to Rahul, , Probably was in a few yards from the ropes and hence, the desperate leap isn't enough, as this just go
full_text: Wheal to Rahul, , Probably was in a few yards from the ropes and hence, the desperate leap isn't enough, as this just goes over his head. All the way. Was a good short ball, wider line and that meant that Rahul had to really fetch the pull stroke. Will get maximum

short_text: Wheal to Rahul, , you pitch it up - you get bashed. Rinse and repeat. Wheal gift-wraps this with width and KL creams the
full_text: Wheal to Rahul, , you pitch it up - you get bashed. Rinse and repeat. Wheal gift-wraps this with width and KL creams the drive through the covers

short_text: Wheal to Rahul, 2 runs, back of a length, not a lot of timing on this straight pull from Rahul. Still gets it over mid-o
full_text: Wheal to Rahul, 2 runs, back of a length, not a lot of timing on this straight pull from Rahul. Still gets it over mid-on somehow. Good chase from the fielder, just about hauls it back in with a desperate slide

short_text: Safyaan Sharif to Rohit, no run, slower and shorter, Rohit tries to cut but misses. Looks at the umps to get a wide but
full_text: Safyaan Sharif to Rohit, no run, slower and shorter, Rohit tries to cut but misses. Looks at the umps to get a wide but not going to get it

short_text: Safyaan Sharif to Rohit, , nonchalance! Sharif continues to pitch them up, and also in the arc. These two in this mood a
full_text: Safyaan Sharif to Rohit, , nonchalance! Sharif continues to pitch them up, and also in the arc. These two in this mood ain't missing out at all. Powerfully whipped over mid-wicket, almost went all the way

short_text: Safyaan Sharif to Rohit, no run, ah, he has missed out there has Rohit. Was on the shorter side and he had made room ear
full_text: Safyaan Sharif to Rohit, no run, ah, he has missed out there has Rohit. Was on the shorter side and he had made room early by backing away, cut well too. Just couldn't beat point

short_text: Safyaan Sharif to Rohit, , this could well be done inside the powerplay you know! The way these two are going. Full and
full_text: Safyaan Sharif to Rohit, , this could well be done inside the powerplay you know! The way these two are going. Full and outside off, Rohit makes a hint of room and goes through with a flowing loft over cover. Clean, crisp and easily over the infield

short_text: Safyaan Sharif to Rohit, no run, slower and shorter on off, grips off the deck just a tad and Rohit takes his bottom han
full_text: Safyaan Sharif to Rohit, no run, slower and shorter on off, grips off the deck just a tad and Rohit takes his bottom hand off while jabbing it to mid-off

short_text: Safyaan Sharif to Rohit, , It's one thing to score runs superfast, it's another to do that with proper eye-catching shot
full_text: Safyaan Sharif to Rohit, , It's one thing to score runs superfast, it's another to do that with proper eye-catching shots. These two are doing just that. Half-volley from Sharif, a bit too straight and Rohit drop-kicks it over cow corner. Effortless pick-up, ideal timing and all the way

short_text: Evans to Rohit, 1 run, down the pitch he comes, finds the length has been shortened and somehow drags it through mid-on
full_text: Evans to Rohit, 1 run, down the pitch he comes, finds the length has been shortened and somehow drags it through mid-on

short_text: Evans to Rohit, , the way these two are going, India might not even need those many overs to get their NRR above everyon
full_text: Evans to Rohit, , the way these two are going, India might not even need those many overs to get their NRR above everyone else. Full in the slot, Rohit creams it over extra

full_text: Evans to Rohit, no run, short and wide, Rohit misses the cut

full_text: Evans to Rahul, 1 run, taps this in front of cover for a single

short_text: Evans to Rahul, , this is gorgeous strokeplay! Pitched up at the stumps, Rahul dropkicks it over square leg for six. Har
full_text: Evans to Rahul, , this is gorgeous strokeplay! Pitched up at the stumps, Rahul dropkicks it over square leg for six. Hardly a followthrough with the bat there, but off it went, soaring into the crowd

short_text: Evans to Rahul, , India have come out flying in this chase. Full and wide, Rahul flays it over point as he throws his ha
full_text: Evans to Rahul, , India have come out flying in this chase. Full and wide, Rahul flays it over point as he throws his hands at it

full_text: Wheal to Rahul, 1 run, overpitched around off, driven to mid-off

short_text: Wheal to Rahul, , this time he executes the pick-up over short fine leg nicely! Not good bowling though. Another one on
full_text: Wheal to Rahul, , this time he executes the pick-up over short fine leg nicely! Not good bowling though. Another one on the pads, and Rahul's too good to miss out

full_text: Wheal to Rahul, no run, short of length outside off, dabbed to short third

full_text: Wheal to Rahul, , sprays this full one down leg

short_text: Wheal to Rahul, , that's gone right off the toe-edge and has raced away through midwicket. Ridiculous. Length ball stray
full_text: Wheal to Rahul, , that's gone right off the toe-edge and has raced away through midwicket. Ridiculous. Length ball straying down leg, short fine is in the ring and Rahul's looking to whip it over that man. But he's early through the shot. Turns out it doesn't matter

short_text: Wheal to Rahul, , wow! Length ball at the stumps and Rahul hits through the line, lofting it over mid-on. Bounces only a
full_text: Wheal to Rahul, , wow! Length ball at the stumps and Rahul hits through the line, lofting it over mid-on. Bounces only a yard or so inside the boundary

full_text: Wheal to Rohit, 1 run, back of a length on leg, clipped to deep backward square

full_text: Mark Watt to Rohit, 1 run, drifting in on leg, Rohit clips it through square leg

full_text: Mark Watt to Rohit, , makes room, it's a full ball floated up outside off, hint of swing away, and Rohit throws his hands at it to slice it over point
